display.purpose: Page-level hero headlines only. One per page. League Gothic at weight 800 delivers maximum impact from the condensed letterforms.

headline.purpose: Section headings, card titles, service names. League Gothic weight 700.

body.purpose: Card descriptions, page copy, form labels. Roboto weight 400, max 65–70ch per line.

label.purpose: Section identifiers, role badges, nav utility labels. Roboto weight 600, uppercase. Never at body sizes.

shadows.name: scroll-separator
shadows.purpose: Navbar on scroll. Single-pixel separation rule, not an elevation signal.

shadows.name: aura-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button and WhatsApp float on hover. The system's interactive elevation signal.

shadows.name: float-glow
shadows.purpose: WhatsApp float at rest. Grounds the float against the page while signaling presence.

shadows.name: float-glow-hover
shadows.purpose: WhatsApp float on hover. Intensified signal.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Mobile menu slide-down. General-purpose state transitions.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Button lifts, card hovers, opacity transitions. Default easing.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Entrance animation: translateY(30px) → 0, opacity 0 → 1. Used with staggered delay classes.

motion.name: fade-in
motion.purpose: Fade-only entrance for elements that should not translate.

motion.name: wa-pulse
motion.purpose: WhatsApp float ambient glow pulse at rest. Pauses on hover.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Below: hamburger nav, single column, WA tooltip hidden

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Shorts grid collapses from 5 to 3 columns

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main CTA surface. Electric and responsive — glows and lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563eb, #1d4ed8); color: #fff; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; border: none; position: relative; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, transparent 40%, rgba(255,255,255,0.1) 60%, transparent 70%); transform: translateX(-100%); transition: transform 0.5s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 32px rgba(37,99,235,0.5), 0 0 8px rgba(37,99,235,0.3); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:hover::after { transform: translateX(100%); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #60a5fa; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Arrow Link
components.description: Ghost CTA used inside cards. Text + animated arrow gap on hover.
components.html: Ver servicios
components.css: .ds-link-arrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; color: #3b82f6; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; text-decoration: none; transition: gap 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-link-arrow:hover { gap: 0.7rem; color: #60a5fa; } .ds-link-arrow:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #60a5fa; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Primary container surface. Depth through translucency and blue border glow on hover.
components.html:
Producción audiovisual

Producción orientada al resultado, desde el diseño de marca hasta videos que retienen al público.

Leer más
components.css: .ds-glass-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 16px; padding: 2rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; transition: background 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-glass-card:hover { background: rgba(37,99,235,0.07); border-color: rgba(37,99,235,0.3); transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-glass-card-title { font-family: 'League Gothic', Impact, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.4rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #f1f5f9; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0; } .ds-glass-card-body { color: #64748b; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.75; margin: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-link-arrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; color: #3b82f6; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; text-decoration: none; transition: gap 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-link-arrow:hover { gap: 0.7rem; color: #60a5fa; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Understated at rest, Aura Blue border signal on focus. Error state via Signal Error border.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.85rem 1rem; color: #e2e8f0; font-size: 0.95rem; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(37,99,235,0.5); } .ds-input-error { border-color: rgba(239,68,68,0.5); }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Fixed header. Transparent at top, frosted glass on scroll. Active links in Aura Blue Light.
components.html:
AuraTeam
InicioServiciosPortafolioEquipo
Contáctanos
components.css: .ds-nav { position: relative; background: rgba(6,11,20,0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-nav-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 1.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'League Gothic', Impact, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.3rem; color: #fff; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 2px; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #60a5fa; } .ds-nav-active { color: #60a5fa; border-bottom-color: #60a5fa; } .ds-btn-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563eb, #1d4ed8); color: #fff; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-nav:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 32px rgba(37,99,235,0.5), 0 0 8px rgba(37,99,235,0.3); transform: translateY(-2px); }

components.name: Role Badge
components.description: Team member role identifier. Sits over the photo gradient overlay at the bottom of team cards.
components.css: .ds-role-badge { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #93c5fd; background: rgba(37,99,235,0.18); border: 1px solid rgba(37,99,235,0.3); border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Signature brand section identifier. Horizontal Aura Blue rules flanking an uppercase Roboto label. One per major section.
components.html: Lo que hacemos
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; justify-content: flex-start; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-section-line { width: 24px; height: 1px; background: #2563eb; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-section-text { font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #3b82f6; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: WhatsApp Float
components.description: Persistent floating CTA in Aura Blue (not WhatsApp green). Pulsing glow at rest, lifts and intensifies on hover. Tooltip appears to the left.
components.css: @keyframes ds-wa-pulse { 0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(37,99,235,0.35), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 4px 30px rgba(37,99,235,0.6), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } } .ds-wa-wrapper { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; } .ds-wa-float { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2563eb, #1d4ed8); color: #fff; text-decoration: none; animation: ds-wa-pulse 2.8s ease-in-out infinite; transition: box-shadow 0.25s ease, transform 0.2s ease; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-wa-float:hover { animation: none; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(37,99,235,0.55), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.06); } .ds-wa-tooltip { font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.82rem; color: #e2e8f0; background: rgba(6,11,20,0.9); border: 1px solid rgba(37,99,235,0.3); border-radius: 6px; padding: 0.35rem 0.7rem; white-space: nowrap; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; transform: translateX(6px); pointer-events: none; } .ds-wa-wrapper:hover .ds-wa-tooltip { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }

narrative.overview:
AuraTeam's visual system is built on a single physical fact: a production studio works in the dark. Screens glow, timelines run, cameras track light. The canvas is void-black not for aesthetic fashion but because it is the material condition of the work. Against that depth, Aura Blue cuts like a live signal — a broadcast frequency, not a decoration.

The system rejects warmth-by-default, chrome-polish, and corporate restraint equally. This is a young Córdoba team shooting real events, editing real reels, building real websites for local pharmacies, fitness studios, and emerging brands. The energy is earned, not borrowed.

This system explicitly refuses: the generic corporate-blue landing page (safe navy + white + stock photos); the cheap template aesthetic (rounded icon above every heading, card grid repeated to extinction, gradient text for emphasis); the grungy industrial dark; and the cold Swiss minimalism that forgets there are humans on both sides of the screen.
keyCharacteristics: Void-dark canvas activates Aura Blue as a live broadcast signal, not ambient color
League Gothic headings deliver impact without shouting — condensed letterforms, maximum information density per line
Glass-and-glow depth replaces traditional shadow elevation; surfaces layer tonally, interactive states fire blue
Motion is specific: each animation earns its place in the interaction it serves
The WhatsApp float uses Aura Blue, not WhatsApp green — the brand owns its color even on utility components

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Aura Blue is the only chromatic statement. No second accent color — not purple, not green, not teal. Aura Indigo appears in gradient backgrounds only. Any proposal to add a second accent is a proposal to dilute the signal.

rules.name: The Depth Rule
rules.body: Background surfaces layer from deepest to shallowest: Space Void → Space Deep → Space Surface → glass fill. No surface goes lighter than glass fill. White on dark breaks the atmospheric canvas.

rules.name: The Two-Font Rule
rules.body: League Gothic for impact, Roboto for legibility. No third family. Roboto Mono is the one permitted exception for code or data display — never for UI chrome.

rules.name: The Weight Cliff Rule
rules.body: League Gothic at 700 or 800 only. Roboto at 400, 500, or 600. The gap between registers is what makes the pairing work. Bridge it and both fonts collapse into sameness.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Cards, inputs, and navigation have no shadow in their default state. Elevation is earned by state change — hover or scroll — not applied decoratively.

rules.name: The Glow-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: When interactive depth needs a visual signal, reach for Aura Blue glow, not a dark box-shadow. Dark-on-dark shadows disappear; blue glow is the system's elevation language.

dos: Do use Aura Blue glow (not dark box-shadows) to signal hover and interactive state.
Do layer backgrounds tonally: Space Void < Space Deep < Space Surface < glass fill.
Do place atmospheric radial-gradient glows behind page sections — wide-radius, low-opacity Aura Blue ellipses.
Do add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternatives for every entrance animation.
Do verify entrance animations fire on initial page load, not only on visible tabs.
Do use League Gothic at weight 700–800 only.
Do use specific alt text on portfolio and team images.
Do keep the Section Label pattern to one per major page section.
donts: Don't use the .gradient-text class (background-clip: text with gradient fill). Remove it. Use solid Aura Blue Mid (#3b82f6) for color emphasis instead.
Don't design any surface to look like a generic corporate-blue landing page: white backgrounds, safe navy accent, stock photography.
Don't introduce a second accent color. Aura Blue's signal strength comes from monopoly.
Don't use Aura Indigo (#818cf8) on text, borders, or interactive elements — background gradient textures only.
Don't add a side-stripe border (thick border-left as a colored accent). Use full borders or background tinting.
Don't use a light background on any card, panel, modal, tooltip, or overlay. Space Surface is the lightest structural surface.
Don't repeat the Section Label on sub-headings within a section. One per section, maximum.
Don't use rounded icon-in-box containers above every card heading as a default affordance.
Don't let body copy fall below Ink Subdued (#64748b) against Space Deep (#060b14) — Ink Ghost (#374151) on Space Deep fails WCAG AA.
